arts.ttl: Braintree Town pay tribute to their former player Devonte Aransibia
arts.sum: "Everyone at Norwich City is deeply saddened to learn of the passing of former academy player Devonte Aransibia, aged 26," a statement from the Canaries read. Writing on X, Braintree said: 'Braintree Town FC are devastated to hear the passing of one of our former players, Devonte Aransibia.
